types.name: Size
types.documentation:
Holds a 2D floating-point size.

You can think of this as an [Offset] from the origin.

properties.name: width
properties.documentation: The horizontal extent of this size.

properties.name: height
properties.documentation: The vertical extent of this size.

types.name: Offset
types.documentation:
An immutable 2D floating-point offset.

An Offset can be used to represent a position relative to the origin, a distance between two points, or a velocity.

types.name: Rect
types.documentation:
An immutable 2D floating-point rectangle.

A Rect can be created with one of several methods:

* [Rect.fromLTRB], which specifies the left, top, right, and bottom edges
* [Rect.fromLTWH], which specifies the left, top, width, and height
* [Rect.fromCircle], which specifies a circular bounding box
* [Rect.fromCenter], which specifies a center point, width, and height
* [Rect.fromPoints], which specifies two opposite corners

properties.name: left
properties.documentation: The offset of the left edge of this rectangle from the x axis.

properties.name: top
properties.documentation: The offset of the top edge of this rectangle from the y axis.

properties.name: right
properties.documentation: The offset of the right edge of this rectangle from the x axis.

properties.name: bottom
properties.documentation: The offset of the bottom edge of this rectangle from the y axis.

types.name: Radius
types.documentation: A radius for either circular or elliptical shapes.

properties.name: x
properties.documentation: The radius value on the horizontal axis.

properties.name: y
properties.documentation: The radius value on the vertical axis.

types.name: Matrix4
types.documentation: 4D Matrix. Values are stored in column major order.

properties.name: storage
properties.documentation: The components of the matrix stored as a 16-element array in column-major order.
